query:
SELECT 
  s.id, s.name,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM restaurants r WHERE r.streetId = s.id AND r.isAcceptingOrders = 1) as manualCount,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM googlePlaceRestaurants g WHERE g.streetId = s.id AND g.isActive = 1) as googleCount,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM restaurants r WHERE r.streetId = s.id AND r.isAcceptingOrders = 1) + 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM googlePlaceRestaurants g WHERE g.streetId = s.id AND g.isActive = 1) as totalCount
FROM streets s
WHERE s.cityId = (SELECT id FROM cities WHERE name = 'بريدة' LIMIT 1)
ORDER BY totalCount DESC
LIMIT 10;
